title: delay textptr check
text: delay textptr check Disable textpointer check during Fetch requests. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = delay textptr check Description This option is required for single table views which contain both a segmented field (Text or Image) and a field whose name is renamed. When this option is set on, the textpointer check is not performed during the Fetch request so that the Fetch can be performed over the view with the renamed fields. Please note that: Segmented fields can never be renamed. Primary key fields cannot be renamed in views which contain segmented fields. Multi-table views do not require this option since the delay textptr check method is always used for multi-table views. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
